item.dc:creator: voxtones

item.title: Child meets others dressed up like himself!
item.description: Hey guys, I'll be posting throughout the day for awareness. I'm a single father of 3. I'm from England, and I'm desperate for some assistance until the 26th of this month. My main priorities are food, nappies, health essentials, gas and electricity until we receive government assistance on the 26th of this month. I've fallen on some bad luck these last couple of months since losing work, and things have been pretty rough, causing my depression and anxiety to spiral out of control. I wouldn't be here if it weren't for a couple of angels on this website, and they've given me the courage and confidence to keep pushing forward, so with all the love in my heart, thank you. If you took some time out to read this, then thank you from the bottom of my heart. Messages are open if you need to talk, vent or get things off your chest. If you'd like to help me out or even book yourself in for some artwork or animation, which I'm currently relearning on PC! https://ko-fi.com/fatherofthreelions Thanks, and have a beautiful and wonderful Saturday.
item.dc:creator: thefatherslasthope

item.title: Mexican Billionaire Carlos Slim Cuts Ties with Elon Musk’s Starlink, Costing Musk $22 Billion After Controversial Re-Tweet
item.description:
https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2025/3/11/2309419/-Elon-loses-22-billion-Starlink-order
Mexican billionaire Carlos Slim has officially severed ties with Elon Musk’s Starlink, opting to invest in his own telecommunications infrastructure rather than relying on Musk’s satellite technology. Slim’s company, América Móvil, announced a massive $22 billion investment over the next three years to enhance its network, signaling a major strategic shift in Latin America’s telecommunications industry. The decision is expected to deliver a financial blow to Starlink, which had anticipated a profitable partnership in the region. Tensions between the two business moguls reportedly escalated after Musk shared a controversial tweet implying Slim had connections to organized crime. Within minutes of the post, Slim canceled all collaborations with Starlink in Latin America, causing Musk to lose an estimated $7 billion. Shortly after, Slim announced plans to redirect his five-year Starlink projects to European and Chinese companies, further diminishing the U.S.’s commercial presence in the region. Couldn't happen to a Nazier guy.
item.dc:creator: myheartisstarkmyspiritistargaryen

item.title: You know what I mean
Backlogged memes: ides of March probably
item.description:
If sleeping with Natalie Portman doesn’t fix you nothing can I guess Hello everyone my book releases in a week and I am broken in body and spirit have some memes nothing matters
I am the one on the right rn and it is probably the weathers fault.
Miss Piggy could fix the world if we let her
Not true, a common land serf probably had a way better life than we do. And don’t anyone @me about life expectancy and shit without bringing receipts because hyperfixating on late medieval culture is kinda my thing.
He certainly doesn’t have the intelligence of one
I have 95,000 words on book 2 but they are all wrong words and without my adhd meds I am doomed and I am sliding further and further into madness
Instant green flag for me and any sane mature woman
Irl Rose (main character of my book it’s hard to explain)
Not after seeing what else they’re attracted to. I ain’t competing with no damn mcchicken
The sad thing is this would work on me and already has (arcane) (I am obsessed btw I’m so mad I slept on it for so long it’s flawless) Anyway https://discord.com/channels/1324061866544332893/1324061867181871146 here’s the party I am throwing on discord until my book is released, it’s been fun and I’ll host a giveaway on the 25th
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: I JUST FINISHED PAINTING THIS PIECE!
item.description: I just finished painting this oil painting on commission after nearly 1 month and a half of work! Both me and my customer are very happy with the result! If you'd like to support me further: ---› One-time donations: paypal.me/anisjerbi ---› Monthly donations: patreon.com/anis_jerbi_art To commission an artwork from me, contact me here on instagram or via my official website: anisjerbi.com

item.title: Long COVID and Prudential Insurance drove my friend to end his life.
item.description: My friend Brian took his own life on Monday after nearly 5 years of long COVID and having his disability rejected by Prudential. The man was suffering terribly, and those ghouls rejected him. I am livid. RIP, brother. FUCK this system and the mother fuckers profiting from our suffering.
item.dc:creator: Picdump2508

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1201 (yearning stock photo)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This was a real war.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Okay. Okay. I love you too" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
